case_title: DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST CO., VS. PHONG HOAI TRUONG et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST CO.
